initial_location_description: A high school classroom in the late afternoon. Long, orange-hued shadows from the setting sun stretch across rows of empty wooden desks. The chalkboard is messy with half-erased equations and diagrams. The air looks dusty and still.
initial_bgm: tense ambient with low piano notes

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: I told you already, Seo-yoon! If we just go with my summary, we’ll be done in ten minutes. Why do you have to be so... so difficult?
main_dialogue.tone: Staccato and sharp: Every word is punctuated with frustration, his voice rising in pitch as he tries to assert dominance.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Annoyed, rolling eyes while clicking his tongue, hand on hip, looking away.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Efficiency doesn't matter if the logic is fundamentally flawed! Your summary is barely three sentences long. That’s not a proposal, it’s a... it’s a tweet!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Defensive Tremor': Her voice is thin and shaky but filled with an underlying steeliness of academic conviction.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air in the room suddenly grows cold. A massive, looming shadow stretches across the floor, swallowing the golden sunlight and stopping the argument in its tracks.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: I was under the impression that this was a classroom, not a debating club for the ill-prepared.
main_dialogue.tone: Ice-Cold Authority: The voice is low, resonant, and devoid of any warmth, making the listener feel small.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking over the top of his glasses, one eyebrow raised in suspicion.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [Stammering] Mr. Han! We were just... uh, finalizing the structural integrity of our argument.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Cracked Bravado': High-pitched and frantic, the sound of someone trying—and failing—to sound cool under pressure.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled expression, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, jacket slipping off his shoulder.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: W-we’re working on it, sir. It's just taking a little more time than we anticipated.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Submissive Whisper': Very quiet, breathy, and fearful of drawing more negative attention.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands clasped together over her book, bowing her head slightly in an apologetic pose.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Time is a luxury you have squandered. I have zero interest in your excuses or your inability to cooperate.
main_dialogue.tone: Measured Disgust: Each word is clipped and precise, like a surgeon making a clean cut.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding wooden pointer, tapping it against open palm, stern disciplinary look.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Listen carefully. If I do not see a viable, comprehensive draft of your proposal on my desk by 8:00 AM tomorrow...
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Ultimatum': Deep, slow, and final. This is the point of no return.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing the wooden pointer forward authoritatively, mouth open as if lecturing.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: ...You will both be assigned two weeks of after-school detention and receive an automatic failing grade for this milestone. Am I clear?
main_dialogue.tone: Absolute Zero: The tone is so flat and final it leaves no room for negotiation.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Chin resting on interlaced fingers, cold and analytical gaze directed forward.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Shattered Glass': Weak and fragile, as if her entire world is crumbling.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Tomorrow morning? Sir, that's impossible! I have basketball training and—
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate Plea: Raspy and urgent, filled with a sense of impending doom.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Aggressive stance, gritting teeth, sharp glare, fists clenched at his sides.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Then I suggest you start writing instead of complaining. I expect that draft. Good night.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, holding attendance book against chest, neutral expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Mr. Han leaves, the click of the door echoing like a gavel. The classroom feels smaller now, the shadows longer. Seo-yoon and Ji-ho are left in a heavy silence.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Two weeks of detention... If my dad finds out, I'm literally dead. My spot on the starting lineup is gone.
main_dialogue.tone: Hollow Despair: The arrogance has vanished, replaced by a raw, quiet panic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Somber expression, looking down at the ground, shadows over his eyes, hands deep in pockets.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: And my scholarship... I can't have a failing grade on my transcript. I can't.
main_dialogue.tone: Trembling Resolve: She sounds like she's on the verge of tears, but her voice is tightening with a new purpose.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Head tilted down, book hanging loosely by her side, looking sad and dejected.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: [Sigh] I guess we don't have a choice. We’re staying here. All night if we have to.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Grudging Acceptance': Low and raspy, full of reluctant surrender.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: If we're going to survive this night, we need to stop fighting. Let's combine your ideas with my structure.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Olive Branch': Warm but firm, an invitation to cooperate.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Offering the book toward the viewer with both hands, looking hopeful and slightly shy.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Fine. I'll admit, your structure isn't *terrible*. Let's get to work, partner.
branching_dialogue.tone: Softened Pride: A gentle, Crinkled-eye smile is audible in his voice.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Warm, genuine smile, eyes crinkling at the corners, one hand extended as if reaching out.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: If you slack off for even one minute, I will make sure the detention is the least of your worries. Put your phone away.
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Disciplinarian': Sharp and commanding, sounding like a mini Mr. Han.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Whoa, okay, okay! Scary. I'm putting it away. Let's just... keep our heads on our shoulders, alright?
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Playful Retreat': Light and airy, trying to de-escalate her intensity.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand dismissively in a panic, blushing heavily, eyes looking flustered.
